html:
<style>
@page { size: A4 landscape; margin: 8mm; }
.esc-print-block { page-break-after: always; }
.esc-print-block:last-child { page-break-after: auto; }
.esc-print-head h3 { margin: 0 0 2px; font-size: 14px; }
.esc-print-meta { font-size: 10px; color: #333; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.esc-print-table { border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; table-layout: fixed; }
.esc-print-table th, .esc-print-table td { border: 0.5px solid #999; text-align: center; font-size: 8px; padding: 0; height: 16px; overflow: hidden; }
.esc-print-table th.vname, .esc-print-table td.vname { width: 110px; min-width: 110px; text-align: left; padding: 1px 4px; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 600; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
.esc-print-table th .dn { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; }
.esc-print-table th .dw { font-size: 6px; color: #666; line-height: 1; }
.esc-print-table th.we { background: #ececec; }
.esc-print-table td.cell { font-weight: 700; }
.cell.pm { background: #d6e6f5; }
.cell.pn { background: #cdd4df; }
.cell.pt { background: #fbedc9; }
.cell.pf { background: #efefef; color: #777; }
.cell.ovr { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1.5px #d6336c; }
.covrow td { border-bottom: 1.5px solid #666; font-weight: 700; }
.cov.co { background: #e7f5ec; color: #198754; }
.cov.cg { background: #fff3cd; color: #b8860b; }
.cov.cd { background: #fde2e4; color: #d6336c; }
.esc-print-legend { font-size: 8px; color: #555; margin-top: 4px; }
</style>
{{ render_escala_print(doc) | safe }}
name: Escala Mensal
